title: Result Unisex R225j Rain Suit
description: Product Description Core Junior Rain Suit Jacket: Waterproof And Windproof. Fully Taped Seams For Both Jacket And Trousers. Integrated Elasticated Hood. Full Front Zip Fastening. 2 Spacious Front Pockets. Adjustable Drawcord Hem On Jacket. Mesh Ventilation On Back Of Jacket. Inner Elasticated Storm Cuff. Stud Closing Front Storm Flap. Reflective Tape On Both Arm Cuffs. Trousers: Fully Taped Seams. Elasticated Waist Band. Two Side Pocket Slots To Access Garment Being Worn Under The Trousers. Adjustable Snap Closing Ankles On Trousers.Decoration Guidelines:Decorating Methods: Direct Print & Transfer Print Decorators Access Point: Open Washing Instructions 30 Degrees. Do Not Bleach. Do Not Iron. Do Not Tumble Dry. Do Not Dry Clean. Do Not Use Softeners Or Biological Wash Liquids Fully Taped Seams, Windproof Integrated Elasticated Hood2 Spacious Front Pockets Fabric 190T 100% Storm Dri 2000 Polyester With Pvc Coating X-Small (3/4) Black Safety Warning Please read all product packaging literature and product labels before use.
